command: bash -c 'grep -qi -e prometheus -e otel docs/observability.md && grep -qi decision .specd/specs/deep-review-phase5-decisions/state.json'

bash -c 'for f in docs/adapter-contract.md docs/delivery-contract.md docs/operating-model-contract.md docs/telemetry-schema.md docs/scale-envelope.md docs/data-classification.md; do if ! grep -qi -e "driver:" -e "status: historical" "$f"; then exit 1; fi; done'
